name: Counter-Strike Profile
description: Shows a Counter-Strike profile with Steam avatar, playtime, kills, wins, accuracy, and K/D.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Steam**
SteamID: `{steam_id}`
Visibility: `{visibility}`
Status: `{persona_state}`
Profile: {profile_link}

**Counter-Strike**
Playtime: `{playtime}`
Kills: `{kills}`
Deaths: `{deaths}`
K/D: `{kd}`
Wins: `{wins}`
MVPs: `{mvps}`
Accuracy: `{accuracy}`
Headshots: `{headshots}`
defaults.missingKeyMessage: Set a Steam Web API key in this node to show Counter-Strike stats. Steam XML profile info can still work without it.
defaults.notFoundMessage: No Steam profile or Counter-Strike stats found for `{query}`. The profile or game stats may be private.
